triage_rows.direction: keep_the_outer controller on steady passive polling when contract_action remains keep_runtime_stack_passive_polling
tighten_runtime-stack polling and reopen the requested target when contract_action rotates into elevate_runtime_stack_loop_and_reopen_target or elevate_runtime_stack_polling_only
interrupt_the_outer controller immediately when contract_action rotates into interrupt_runtime_stack_loop_and_reopen_target

interpretation: This is the topmost execution-facing contract for the runtime-stack control loop.
An outer controller can stop here and run the next cycle directly from the contract unless it needs deeper diagnostics.
